2606.05661.title: Continual Learning Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI Systems in Real-World Stateful Environments
2606.05661.paper_summary: Continual learning, the ability of AI systems to improve through sequential experience, has attracted substantial interest, but no high-quality benchmark exists to evaluate it. We introduce Continual Learning Bench (CL-Bench), the first difficult, expert-validated benchmark designed to measure whether LLM-based systems genuinely improve with experience. CL-Bench spans six diverse domains (software engineering, signal processing, disease outbreak forecasting, database querying, strategic game-playing, and demand forecasting), each validated by domain experts and designed so that tasks share a learnable latent structure (codebase layout, disease outbreak dynamics, opponent strategies) that a stateful system can discover online but a stateless one cannot. We evaluate frontier models across several agent architectures, from naive in-context learning (ICL) to dedicated memory systems, introducing a gain metric to isolate learning from prior capabilities. We find that these systems leave headroom for improved continual learning: agents frequently overfit to immediate observations or fail to reuse knowledge across instances, and dedicated memory systems do not fix this -- in fact, naive ICL outperforms systems dedicated to memory management. CL-Bench is the first benchmark to evaluate continual learning across diverse real-world domains with expert-validated tasks and isolate online learning from underlying model capability, showing a need for better continual learning systems.
2606.05661.paper_summary_zh: 持續學習，即人工智慧系統通過連續經驗進行改進的能力，已引起了相當大的興趣，但目前尚無高品質基準來評估它。<lb/>我們介紹了持續學習基準（CL-Bench），這是第一個困難的、經專家驗證的基準，旨在測量基於LLM的系統是否真正隨著經驗而改進。<lb/>CL-Bench涵蓋六個不同的領域（軟體工程、信號處理、疾病爆發預測、資料庫查詢、策略遊戲和需求預測），每個領域都經過領域專家的驗證，並設計成任務共享可學習的潛在結構（代碼庫佈局、疾病爆發動態、對手策略），這樣一個有狀態的系統可以在線發現，但無狀態的系統則無法。<lb/>我們在幾種代理架構中評估前沿模型，從天真的上下文學習（ICL）到專用記憶系統，引入了一個增益指標以隔離學習與先前能力之間的關係。<lb/>我們發現這些系統仍有改進持續學習的空間：代理經常對即時觀察過擬合或未能在實例之間重用知識，而專用記憶系統並未解決這一問題——事實上，天真的ICL在記憶管理專用系統中表現更佳。<lb/>CL-Bench是第一個評估持續學習的基準，涵蓋多個真實世界的領域，並具有專家驗證的任務，能夠將在線學習與基礎模型能力隔離，顯示出對更好的持續學習系統的需求。
2606.05661.author: Parth Asawa et.al.
2606.05661.authors: Parth Asawa, Christopher M. Glaze, Gabriel Orlanski, Ramya Ramakrishnan, Benji Xu, Asim Biswal, Vincent Sunn Chen, Frederic Sala, Matei Zaharia, Joseph E. Gonzalez
